projects.title: salitAI.orbit
projects.impact: AI takes the notes so the whole team can focus on the actual meeting.
projects.outcome: Task ownership and deadlines are extracted automatically from meeting content.
projects.description: salitAI.orbit captures spoken discussion, transforms it into structured notes, and highlights assigned action items with due dates so that teams leave every meeting with clarity.
highlights: Designed a cleaner meeting-to-action workflow instead of raw transcript dumping.
Focused on usability so non-technical users can immediately understand outputs.
Structured result cards for owners, tasks, and deadlines for stronger accountability.

projects.title: Plastech
projects.impact: Turns plastic waste into connectivity value for communities.
projects.outcome: Recycling becomes directly useful through incentive-based digital access.
projects.description: PlasTech transforms recycled plastic into innovative WiFi-linked community solutions, combining sustainability and applied AI to connect environmental action with practical digital benefit.
highlights: Connects sustainability, behavior change, and digital inclusion in one concept.
Designed for social impact, not just technical novelty.
Strong storytelling potential for competitions and presentations.

projects.title: SHAPE: Speech, Hearing, Autism Personalized Education
projects.role: Project Manager + Frontend Developer + Game Developer
projects.impact: Makes learning more accessible for students with special needs.
projects.outcome: Interactive education delivery becomes more adaptive and engaging.
projects.description: SHAPE is a mobile learning application designed for learners with autism and hearing challenges, using tailored content and game-like interactions to improve classroom support and communication.
highlights: Focused on accessible interaction design for real learner needs.
Used game elements to support engagement and retention.
Balanced product planning, implementation, and presentation quality.

projects.title: Travel Orbit
projects.role: Frontend Developer + UX Designer + Project Manager
projects.impact: Delivers a smoother ticketing and planning experience.
projects.outcome: Users can compare, plan, and book with less friction and better clarity.
projects.description: Travel Orbit is an online ticketing platform that simplifies travel planning by organizing trip options, surfacing helpful recommendations, and reducing the cognitive load of multi-step booking flows.
highlights: Prioritized user flow and visual clarity across booking screens.
Designed around simplification of decision-heavy user journeys.
Great candidate for a polished case-study presentation.

timeline.title: Founder and Lead Developer, DotOrbit Development Team
